question.text: Which of the following is a key feature of the NEAT-F&O trading system?

answer.text: It provides anonymous order matching based on price-time priority
It allows negotiated deals between known counterparties
It operates on an open-outcry system
It matches orders based solely on time priority

explanation.text:
**The Logic:** NEAT-F&O is an anonymous order-driven system where orders are matched on price-time priority. Buyers and sellers do not know each other's identity. The best price gets priority; among orders at the same price, the one entered earlier gets matched first.
**The Trap:** Open-outcry systems are old pit-based trading methods, not used in Indian derivatives. Negotiated deals happen in OTC markets, not exchange-traded derivatives.
**Cross-Exam Context:** Price-time priority is a universal matching principle tested across all exchange-related NISM exams.
**Key Takeaway:** NEAT-F&O features: anonymous trading, order-driven, price-time priority matching, fully electronic.
